scripts.dev: pnpm kill-ports && docker compose up -d && wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 tcp:localhost:6379 && pnpm --filter backend migration:run && pnpm --filter backend seed && concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter backend start:dev" "pnpm --filter @invoice-flow/frontend dev"
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
